##NAMES=Ericssonite
##RRUFFID=R130001
##IDEAL CHEMISTRY=BaMn^2+^_2_Fe^3+^(Si_2_O_7_)O(OH)
##LOCALITY=Langban, Filipstad, Varmland, Sweden
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Marcus Origlieri
##DESCRIPTION=Dark red platy, massive, monoclinic polytype, associated with caryopilite
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral is confirmed by single-crystal X-ray diffraction and chemical analysis
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R130001
##MEASURED CHEMISTRY=(Ba_1.01_Pb_0.01_)(Mn_1.95_Mg_0.05_)Fe_0.98_(Si_2_O_7_)O[(OH)_0.96_F_0.04_]
##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Single crystal, powder profile is calculated

##FILETYPE=Raman Processed
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=780
